summary: The fix correctly addresses VAL-LOW-002 by changing main.go to require WEBHOOK_SECRET as a fatal error instead of just a warning. This makes the behavior consistent with config.go validation (which returns an error for empty secrets when webhooks are enabled) and httpserver.validateWebhook (which rejects all requests when the server secret is empty). The change is minimal, clean, and follows CLAUDE.md patterns. All existing tests verify the expected behavior.
